risks.description: Many artifacts lack channel_targets; retrieval-bundle synthesis is constrained.
Cross-product entity/terminology collisions detected without shared-concept registry; access fan-out cannot deduplicate.
5/6 products have no troubleshooting artifacts; troubleshooting-bundle synthesis blocked per product.
2 products have empty warning corpus; procedural-context warning-injection cannot fire.
Most artifacts are extraction-pending-review; canonical/verified pool is small (~7%); RAG gating excludes the majority.
Bundles do not yet carry knowledge-core snapshot hash; deterministic re-issue requires future lifecycle integration.
Per-artifact audience-scope assignments are not yet authored; hierarchy filtering relies on heuristics.
Disambiguation contract is declared but not exercised against a real query corpus.
